channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Over grown grass, 6th June
item.description:
The grass verge on the right side of 20 Essex Close, GL3 1NZ is extremely overgrown. I’ve tried to maintain it myself but I don’t have the tools, and it’s now become a safety issue because my 3‑year‑old can’t safely get out of our garden gate due to the height and condition of the grass. All the other verges in the neighbourhood are being cut regularly, but this one is always missed. My house now looks like it’s next to a jungle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgrove Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders bag full of rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Here in a gateway and also the otherside of the motorway bridge before Sherdons golf driving range are builders bags full of flytipped rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp objects and flytipping, 6th June
item.description:
Not very obvious from the road but some metal spikes are protruding from the hedge, seemingly a flytipped gate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus stop, 6th June
item.description:
More graffiti but on Royal Well Stop D. There is also some at Stop A

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Well Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number 91, 6th June
item.description:
The small wall is looking like it will collapse soon and needs to be reported to the owner. The hedge above it seems to be pushing it outward

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Several potholes on the bridge next to pavement, 6th June
item.description:
These potholes have been fixed before but are becoming a problem as they are on the railway bridge so cannot be avoided
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 6th June
item.description:
Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Near junction of Cheltenham & Nine Elms Road. Next to litter bin: 0230 What3words location: ///doctor.hiked.extension

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Footpath to Frogmill overgrown with vegetation, 6th June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation/stinging nettles, from the A40 traffic lights down to the A436 Frogmill/Bus stop Layby and Bus Shelter. Stinging nettles within and surrounding the Bus Stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 inch deep hot hole which takes up most of the road in broken up tarmac, 6th June
item.description:
If coming from Birdlip Village halfway up Hill postcode for the Road is GL4 8LH
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain still blocked - by substation on Wellington Lane, 6th June
item.description:
The drain opposite Number 24 is blocked, this was previously reported, however it has now got worse, with weeds now growing out of the drain. Creating lots of surface water / flooding risk during heavy rain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Wellington Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The path should be 2m wide as it is a bridleway - currently it is 6” and the crop is oats which will grow to 5ft, 6th June
item.description:
Gloucestershire Way bridleway from A435 up to Upper Coberley. What three words: sourcing.mistress.eyebrows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Middle of road very deep between cats eyes and road on edge next to house has now eroded to give a drop on the white line, 6th June
item.description:
Outside of new house- Suomi- Road has eroded so bad it’s not only very dangerous for cyclists but also cars and motorbikes- especially when they over take other cycles and hit the dip in the middle of the road- they swerve as the tyres drop into the eroded highway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Drain blocked with mud, 6th June

Promenade Cheltenham towards the rear of the taxi rank

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights out Warden Hill Rd, 6th June
item.description:
A number of street lights are out in Warden Hill Rd and have been for some days. Need fixing asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
